ROOM 501. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER ERIC THRONE. CLERK GARTH SAYERS. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ ON THE RECORD IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. DEFT. WILL VACTATE THE BASEMENT STORAGE ARE OF 2808 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, WITHIN SIXTY DAYS. DEFT. AGREES TO PROVIDE ACCESS FOR PLTF. TO PERFORM CONSTRUCTION WORK IN THE AREA. FAILURE OF DEFT. TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT WILL PERMIT PLTF TO FILE FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITH 48 HOURS EX-PARTE NOTICE. CLAIMS FOR BACK RENT AND FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT ARE WAIVED PURSUANT TO CC1542. TRIAL IS VACATED.
